194H of the 1961 Act.
5.2 She contended that the relationship between the Government 
and the stamp vendors is that of principal and agent. The 
learned A.S.G. further submitted that the High Court was right 
not only in saying that the stamp vendors are public servants 
for the purposes of the PC Act but even otherwise on merits 
also, the High Court rightly affirmed the judgment and order of 
conviction passed by the Trial Court.
5.3 In such circumstances referred to above, the learned A.S.G. 
prayed that there being no merit in this appeal, the same may 
be dismissed.
[2025] 6 S.C.R.  
75
Aman Bhatia v. State (GNCT of Delhi)
E.
